name: MySQL
description: MySQL 8.4 LTS relational database server. Other apps connect to it over the internal network.

inputs.label: Root password
inputs.help: Password for the MySQL root user. No default — you choose it. Stored encrypted.

inputs.label: Initial database (optional)
inputs.help: If set, a database with this name is created on first start.

compose:
name: "slashnode-mysql"
services:
  mysql:
    image: "mysql:8.4"
    container_name: "mysql"
    restart: "unless-stopped"
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: "${secret.ROOT_PASSWORD}"
      MYSQL_DATABASE: "${input.DATABASE}"
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:3306:3306"
    volumes:
      - "mysql-data:/var/lib/mysql"
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  mysql-data:
    name: "slashnode-mysql_mysql_mysql-data"
notes: No web UI — this is a database server reached by other apps at host "mysql" port 3306 on the slashnode network, or on 127.0.0.1:3306 from the node (and via the app's .onion). You define the root password; there is no default.
